feat.name: Invigorating Breath
feat.requirement: You are adjacent to your spirit guide or it is sharing your space.
feat.text: Your spirit guide exhales its sweet-smelling breath on you, granting you the strength to push through your pain. You gain 20 temporary Hit Points for 10 minutes. At 15th level, you instead gain 30 temporary Hit Points for 10 minutes.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
